description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the global image viraweb/mblowfish-angularjs-builder:1.0.0 and overriding to node:8 for the build-project job, with a cache on node_modules. Define a build-project job that runs only on the master and develop branches, executes the exact commands: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c "grunt test"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c "grunt release", and stores coverage/, doc/ and dist/ as artifacts for 1 day with a coverage regex. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on master, depends on build-project, uses the global image, runs ls -l; mkdir .public; mv coverage/ .public/coverage/; mv doc/ .public/doc/; mv .public public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact for 90 days.
